macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Climb as Trump Hints at Swift End to Iran Conflict; Oil Futures Tumble 15%
items.summary: Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq turned positive on March 10, rising 0.7%, 0.6%, and 0.6% respectively, amid President Trump's comments on ending the Iran war, while oil prices fell sharply. Investors eye upcoming CPI on Wednesday and PCE data on Friday, with Oracle reporting earnings after close.

items.title: Major Indexes Muted with Oil Swings; AI Stocks Show Strength Including ASML and GSK
items.summary: On March 10, Nasdaq was flat, S&P 500 down 0.2%, Dow down less than 0.1%, and Russell 2000 down 0.25%, amid volatile oil prices, but AI-related stocks performed strongly.

items.title: Oracle Reports Fiscal Q3 Earnings After Market Close on March 10
items.summary: Oracle (ORCL) released its fiscal third quarter earnings post-market on Tuesday, drawing investor attention amid software sector weakness and broader market rotation.

items.title: NFJ's Burns McKinney Calls Microsoft a Buy Amid Oracle Earnings
items.summary: NFJ Investment Group's Burns McKinney highlighted Microsoft as a top pick following Oracle’s fiscal Q3 earnings report on March 10.

items.title: Tom Lee Predicts Markets Higher in March Despite Later Bear Market; Handles Oil Spike Well
items.summary: Fundstrat's Tom Lee forecasts equity gains through March end, noting S&P higher despite oil up $15 in two days, driven by US growth rotation from rest of world.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Reaches $69,300 Amid Market Morning Updates
items.summary: Bitcoin is trading at $69,300 and XRP at $1.37 in the latest market analysis. The video covers cryptocurrency news, chart analysis, and motivation for major assets like BTC and XRP.

items.title: Warnings of Imminent Bitcoin Bull Trap in Crypto Markets
items.summary: Market analysts caution that conditions are setting up for a potential Bitcoin bull trap, possibly today, amid stock market updates, gold analysis, and crypto sentiment shifts. Key factors include BTC resistance levels, ETF inflows, and Strait of Hormuz disruptions.

items.title: BlackRock XRP ETF Rumors Gain Traction with Tokenization Push
items.summary: Speculation surrounds BlackRock's potential XRP ETF as it advances tokenization of securities on the XRP Ledger amid a $2 trillion private credit liquidity crisis. Developments include $2.3B in real-world assets, XLS-66 lending protocol, and EVM sidechain launch planned for 2026.

items.title: US CPI Data and Elon Musk's X Payments Beta Test Eyed for Bitcoin Impact
items.summary: Upcoming US CPI release could drive Bitcoin past key resistance levels, while Elon Musk confirms X's payment feature (Xonnaie) beta testing internally, set for public launch in April. Stellar (XLM) shows rebound potential.

items.title: Bloomberg Highlights Stablecoin Adoption and Circle Stock Surge
items.summary: Stablecoins dominate discussions at crypto conferences with over 2,000 attendees, emphasizing capital efficiency and DTCC's role in inventory access. Circle shares climb amid positive market plumbing performance during volatile days.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.4 with Native Computer Use
items.summary: OpenAI launched GPT-5.4 on March 11, 2026, featuring native computer use capabilities. This marks a significant advancement in AI agent functionality.

items.title: Anthropic Sues Pentagon in Historic Legal Battle
items.summary: Anthropic is engaged in a legal fight against the Pentagon, highlighting tensions between AI development and government interests. The case underscores growing conflicts in AI governance.

items.title: China's 15th Five-Year Plan Prioritizes AI and Semiconductors
items.summary: China's new plan emphasizes 'New Productive Forces' including semiconductors, quantum technology, and AI-driven material simulations. It aims to boost strategic economic benchmarks through AI integration.

items.title: Appier Unveils Risk-Aware Framework for Agentic AI
items.summary: Appier Research introduced a 'Risk-Aware Decision Framework' using skill decomposition to enhance trustworthiness of autonomous AI agents in enterprises. It addresses hallucinations and incorrect actions.

items.title: Breakthrough in Reconstructing Animal Perception from Brain Activity
items.summary: University of Hawaii researchers used AI to reconstruct short movies from mouse visual cortex activity, advancing neural decoding. Ethical concerns raised about neural privacy.

items.title: Physics-Informed ML Accelerates Material Science Simulations
items.summary: New physics-informed machine learning algorithms simulate chemical reactions in extreme environments, reducing simulation time from months to days. Applications include energy and aerospace materials.

items.title: Anthropic Labels Chinese AI Firms as National Security Threats
items.summary: Anthropic urged treating DeepSeek, MoonshotAI, and MiniMax as security risks amid US-China AI rivalry over model distillation and chip access. Reflects geopolitical AI competition.

items.title: UB Evaluates AI for Wildfire Spread Prediction
items.summary: University at Buffalo researchers tested deep learning models like ConvLSTM against traditional FARSITE, finding AI offers flexibility with real-time data but lower precision. AI complements physics-based tools.

items.title: MIT Develops VLMFP for Complex Visual Task Planning
items.summary: MIT's generative AI method using vision-language models achieves 60-80% success on visual planning tasks like robot navigation, outperforming baselines. Handles 2D/3D scenarios with generalization.

items.title: 2026 Report: 1,500% Surge in Agentic AI Cybercrime
items.summary: Global Threat Intelligence Report notes massive rise in AI-related illicit activity and compromised credentials driving attacks. Ransomware shifts to agentic AI exploitation.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Snail Games Unveils PixARK Worlds and Gobby Gang at GDC 2026 Private Showcase
items.summary: Snail Games hosted an invite-only event at GDC 2026, announcing PixARK Worlds for Nintendo Switch 2 in the ARK franchise and a new indie title Gobby Gang now wishlisted on Steam. Bellwright also hit 1 million units sold, nearing full release and console ports.

items.title: Xsolla Releases Report on Key Opportunities in Video Games Including AI and Cross-Platform Growth
items.summary: Xsolla's new report highlights AI reducing development timelines by 20% and support costs by 40%, 43% of US gamers playing across platforms, and growth in live service models like PUBG and Roblox. It coincides with their Platinum sponsorship at Pocket Gamer Connects Summit San Francisco 2026.

items.title: Stardock Expands Publishing Services for Indie Developers
items.summary: Stardock Entertainment announced it will publish three indie titles per year, focusing on marketing, testing, support, and long-term partnerships to help outstanding games reach audiences.

items.title: VanEck Gaming ETF Faces Pressure from GTA VI Delay and Weak Consumer Sentiment
items.summary: VanEck's Video Gaming and eSports ETF (ESPO) is down 10.5% YTD amid economic uncertainty and Take-Two Interactive's GTA VI delay impacting its 5.66% weighting in the $300B gaming market fund.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Fibocom Launches MQ771-GL Ultra-Low Power Module for Smart Pet Collars at Embedded World 2026
items.summary: Fibocom unveiled the MQ771-GL, a compact (17.7 mm × 15.8 mm) LPWA module with PSM current as low as 1 μA, extending battery life from days to months and supporting global Cat.M/NB-IoT bands for reliable pet tracking worldwide.
